name: Perfect Rice Cooker
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow directions on rice package for proportion of rice to water (up to 4 cups raw rice may be prepared, making 10 cups cooked).
2. Rub Crock-Pot lightly with butter.
3. Pour in rice, water, and salt.
4. Cover and cook on High for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. When turned off, the Crock-Pot will keep rice warm for serving for 2 to 3 hours.
6. To "cook all day" (Low: 8 to 10 hours), use 2 to 3 cups long grain converted rice, 4 to 6 cups water or broth, and 2 tablespoons butter. Salt before serving.
